description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang Docker image and define variables ARTIFACTS_DIR, BIN_NAME, GO_PROJECT. Include a global before_script that creates the Go workspace directories, fetches dep, copies the project into $GOPATH/src/$GO_PROJECT, changes into that directory and runs dep ensure. In the test stage add a testacc job that runs TF_ACC=true go test -v . and a unit_tests job that runs go test -v -cover . . In the build stage add a build job that compiles the binary with go build -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/$ARTIFACTS_DIR/$BIN_NAME. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
